name: Firefox Focus
description: Privacy-focused mobile browser by Mozilla with automatic tracker blocking and one-tap browsing history erasure.

years.notes: Original Firefox Focus icon-only mark (magenta/pink stylized fox flame). Launched as standalone browser on Android in June 2017. viewBox 1024x1024.
Redesigned icon with purple/magenta fox and orange-coral gradient inner flame, matching Firefox family rebrand. Official Mozilla protocol-assets release. viewBox 80x80.
